category_title: Students with autism spectrum disorder who shift conversational topics to personal interests
scenario_title: Passive involvement and ignored bids in cooperative groups
minimal_context: Jeff is participating in a language-dependent social task within a cooperative learning group.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Jeff, please share your ideas with your cooperative learning group for this activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits quietly with the peers and does not volunteer information or ask questions.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and tell them what you think.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: The sheeps went... (Offers a conversational bid, but the others in the group ignore his contribution.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to talk to your group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains passively unengaged, does not answer questions, and does not initiate any further conversations with the group.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Jeff, please share your ideas with your cooperative learning group for this activity.

STUDENT: (Sits quietly with the peers and does not volunteer information or ask questions.)

TUTOR: Go ahead and tell them what you think.

STUDENT: The sheeps went... (Offers a conversational bid, but the others in the group ignore his contribution.)

TUTOR: Keep trying to talk to your group.

STUDENT: (Remains passively unengaged, does not answer questions, and does not initiate any further conversations with the group.)

task.content: Participating in social tasks that are strongly dependent on language

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When needing to initiate conversations or offer a conversational bid
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Seldom volunteered information, asked questions, or answered questions—and when they did, others in the group tended to ignore their contributions

behavior_patterns.condition: When participating in social tasks that are strongly dependent on language
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Less likely to initiate conversations or be acknowledged when they do offer a conversational bid
